copyreg/pickle.name: pickle
copyreg/pickle.description: Declares that function should be used as a “reduction” function for objects of type type. function must return either a string or a tuple containing between two and six elements. See the dispatch_table for more details on the interface of function. The constructor_ob parameter is a legacy feature and is now ignored, but if passed it must be a callable. Note that the dispatch_table attribute of a pickler object or subclass of pickle.Pickler can also be used for declaring reduction functions.
